---
title: "Kennon Holton-Tran"
subtitle: "Business Administration, E-Business | Cal Poly Pomona"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
---

# Professional Summary

I am a Business Administration student with an E-Business emphasis at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona. My interests sit at the intersection of strategy, analytics, technology, and digital business.

My career goal is to move into a strategic leadership role where I can help define a company’s vision, organize the structure needed to support that vision, and use data to guide better business decisions.

# Career Objective

I am interested in roles that combine business strategy, analytics, digital marketing, and technology. Long term, I want to work in a leadership role where I can help organizations improve systems, make better decisions, and connect big-picture goals to practical execution.

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-card}

# Core Skills

- Business analytics
- Digital marketing
- Google Analytics 4
- R and Quarto
- Data visualization
- Dashboard development
- Strategic planning
- Technology and product thinking
- Professional communication
- Project organization

:::

::: {.skill-card}

# Technical Tools

- Quarto
- R
- GitHub Pages
- Google Analytics 4
- Google Ads
- Tableau
- Power BI
- Looker Studio
- BigQuery

:::

:::

# Education

**California State Polytechnic University, Pomona**  
Business Administration, E-Business

# Portfolio Highlights

## Marketing Analytics Dashboard

I built a Quarto dashboard that summarizes marketing campaign performance using impressions, clicks, conversions, click-through rate, conversion rate, and cost per conversion.

## Google Analytics 4

I completed the Google Analytics Certification in 2026 and built a portfolio page explaining how GA4 supports digital measurement, marketing analysis, and business decision-making.

## Projects

My projects page includes work connected to streaming service loyalty, Google Analytics, dashboard development, entrepreneurship, and career branding.

## Revealjs Presentation

I created a Revealjs presentation using Quarto to summarize my portfolio, technical skills, business skills, and career direction.

# Professional Strengths

My strengths are strongest when I can connect ideas, organize messy information, and turn broad goals into a clearer plan. I like work that requires both strategic thinking and practical follow-through.

I am especially interested in work where data, systems, and people all matter. I want to help teams make smarter decisions, communicate more clearly, and build better structures around their goals.
